Our Story

Why Edgewater Chooses C.R & Co Barbers

We are a trusted barbershop proudly serving the Edgewater community. Known for quality, reliability, and outstanding customer service — which is why our customers keep coming back and telling their friends.

With a 5.0-star rating from 397 verified customers on Google, our reputation speaks for itself. Every client walks away satisfied — that's not a goal, it's our standard.

What People Say

Real Reviews from Google

★★★★★

"Christian is top class. Absolute professional, great attention to detail, and consistently delivers exactly what you ask for. Takes his time, knows his craft, and the standard is elite every single visit. Sound guy as well easy chat, relaxed atmosphere, and you leave looking sharp every time. Wouldn’t go anywhere else."

— John Ennis  ·  4 months ago
★★★★★

"Chris is the best barber I've been to in a while! I gave him the direction I wanted to go with my hair and Chris did a amazing job! Definitely recommend coming here if you're looking for a new barber. I'll be back very soon!"

— Eve Torres  ·  7 months ago
★★★★★

"The barbers are highly skilled, detail-oriented, and truly take pride in their craft. Whether it’s a classic cut or a modern style, they listen carefully and make sure you leave looking sharp and confident. The atmosphere is welcoming, clean, and professional, with a relaxed vibe that makes every visit enjoyable. Appo"

— Aibekhanya Cardenas  ·  2 months ago
★★★★★

"Man chris is a very talented barber. This guy is fast and made sure I was good before he even took of the cap. You can tell this brother knows what he is doing with the clippers. I 100% recommend Chris if you’re looking to get a fresh fade. Thanks chris."

— Oscar Rangel  ·  2 months ago
